Ribbon Kiss Kitty

A minimalist kawaii kitty with an oversized candy-red bow reigns over soft blush rows and snow-white columns. Clean, iconic lines and a strict pink-white-red palette deliver that instantly recognisable bow-kitty charm — simple, joyful, and irresistibly cute.

Download PDFDownload SVGView JSON
